title: The Capital Falls Into Chaos
description: On pages 8–11, this part focuses on the capital falls into chaos, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Capital Falls Into Chaos. As Luffy is gone and the armies clash, Crocodile’s plan appears to be working exactly as intended. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Farewell.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: trod

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That was a complete waste of my time...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: You want me to go to Alubarma!?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Am I to pursue the Straw-Hats there!?

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Or are you telling me to help the royal- ists quell the uprising...?

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: I'll leave that to you!

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Pardon!?

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: You decide on your own what the right thing to do is.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Just what on Earth is going on, Captain!?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Follow your own sense of justice. That'll be good enough.

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Whatever happens, I'll take responsibility.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: And where are you going, Capt. Smoker!?

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: VIRM...

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: I need to go back out to sea on urgent business.

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Be ready to receive further orders from me at all times.

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: Tashigi.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Yes!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Keep a close eye on the impending conclusion to this kingdom's crisis.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Whether Alabama falls or survives...

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: Cries like these always mark the turning point of an era...!

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: SGT. TASHIGHT! YOUR ORDERS, PLEASE!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: O-oh, right...!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: We shall resume our pursuit for the Straw- Hat pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Clutch!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Restock on ammunition so we can then depart for Alubarma as soon as possible!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!

summary: This part develops the capital falls into chaos and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
